title: Spiderwalker
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Spiderwalker.jpg|thumb]]
'''Spiderwalkers''' were combat [[Bioengineering/Legends|bio-constructs]] of the [[Charon/Legends|Charon]] created on [[Stronghold (planet)|Stronghold]] by combining Charon and [[Human/Legends|Human]] genes. They had eight [[Charon/Legends|Charon]] legs, humanoid torsos, Charon claws, and numerous Human eyes.

==Appearances==
*''[[Otherspace II: Invasion]]'' {{1st}}
